steps.action: Create Oura connection and sync data
steps.observed: Connection created, synced 56 data points across 8 metrics
Share created with id=57d17604-2708-4000-8c7b-39551c5a391f, token returned

steps.expected: 200 with grant details and Set-Cookie header
steps.observed: 200 returned with valid=true, owner_display_name, label, allowed_metrics, data_start, data_end, expires_at. Set-Cookie: totus_viewer=<JWT>; Path=/; HttpOnly; SameSite=lax

evidence.network: POST /api/viewer/validate -> 200, Set-Cookie: totus_viewer=<JWT>; Path=/; Expires=Mon, 09 Mar 2026 16:55:29 GMT; Max-Age=14400; HttpOnly; SameSite=lax

steps.observed: 404 with error code SHARE_NOT_FOUND and message 'This share link is not available. It may have expired, been revoked, or never existed.'

evidence.network: POST /api/viewer/validate -> 404 {"error":{"code":"SHARE_NOT_FOUND","message":"This share link is not available. It may have expired, been revoked, or never existed."}}

steps.expected: 200 with only granted metrics (sleep_score, hrv, rhr) in granted date range
steps.observed: 200 returned with all 3 metrics containing data points from 2026-03-03 to 2026-03-09. scope.allowed_metrics=[sleep_score,hrv,rhr], scope.data_start=2025-12-01, scope.data_end=2026-06-01

steps.action: GET /api/viewer/data?metrics=sleep_score,steps,readiness_score&start=2026-03-01&end=2026-03-09 with viewer cookie (grant allows sleep_score,hrv,rhr)
steps.expected: 200 with only sleep_score returned (narrowing, not error)
steps.observed: 200 returned with only sleep_score data. query.metrics_requested=[sleep_score,steps,readiness_score], query.metrics_returned=[sleep_score]. Out-of-scope metrics (steps, readiness_score) silently dropped.

assertions.title: Viewer data rejects empty metric intersection

steps.action: GET /api/viewer/data?metrics=steps,readiness_score,active_calories&start=2026-03-01&end=2026-03-09 with viewer cookie (grant allows sleep_score,hrv,rhr — zero overlap)
steps.observed: 403 Forbidden with error code FORBIDDEN and message 'No permitted metrics in this request'

evidence.network: GET /api/viewer/data?metrics=steps,readiness_score,active_calories&start=2026-03-01&end=2026-03-09 -> 403 {"error":{"code":"FORBIDDEN","message":"No permitted metrics in this request"}}

assertions.title: Viewer token validation issues JWT cookie

steps.action: POST /api/viewer/validate with valid token, inspect Set-Cookie header
steps.expected: 200 with totus_viewer httpOnly cookie containing a JWT
steps.observed: Set-Cookie header: totus_viewer=<JWT>; Path=/; Expires=Mon, 09 Mar 2026 16:55:29 GMT; Max-Age=14400; HttpOnly; SameSite=lax. Cookie value is a valid JWT with 3 dot-separated parts.

evidence.network: POST /api/viewer/validate -> 200, Set-Cookie: totus_viewer=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...; Path=/; HttpOnly; SameSite=lax

steps.action: Insert share_grant with grant_expires = NOW() - 1 day via SQL
steps.observed: INSERT 0 1 — expired grant created for token 'expired-viewer-test-token-xyz'
404 Not Found with error code SHARE_NOT_FOUND and message 'The share link was not found or is no longer available'

evidence.network: POST /api/viewer/validate -> 404 {"error":{"code":"SHARE_NOT_FOUND","message":"The share link was not found or is no longer available"}}

steps.action: POST /api/shares to create a new share grant
POST /api/viewer/validate with the revoked share's token
steps.observed: 404 Not Found with error code SHARE_NOT_FOUND and message 'The share link was not found or is no longer available'

steps.action: Decode JWT from 7-day expiry grant (token validated at iat=1773060929)
steps.observed: exp=1773075329, iat=1773060929, diff=14400 seconds = exactly 4 hours. Correct: grant expires in 7 days, so min(7d, 4h) = 4h.

steps.action: Insert grant with 1-hour expiry via SQL, validate, decode JWT
steps.observed: exp=1773064611, iat=1773061022, diff=3589 seconds ≈ 0.997 hours. Correct: grant expires in ~1h, so min(1h, 4h) = ~1h.

evidence.network: Case 1: JWT TTL = 14400s (4h) for 7-day grant. Case 2: JWT TTL = 3589s (~1h) for 1-hour grant. Both follow min(grant_expires, now+4h).

steps.action: Decode JWT payload from totus_viewer cookie
steps.expected: JWT contains grantId, ownerId, allowedMetrics, dataStart, dataEnd, iat, exp, and jti
steps.observed: All required claims present: grantId='57d17604-2708-4000-8c7b-39551c5a391f', ownerId='mock_viewer_owner1_example_com', allowedMetrics=['sleep_score','hrv','rhr'], dataStart='2025-12-01', dataEnd='2026-06-01', iat=1773060929, exp=1773075329, jti='c28421cbccffafd946c06209b150adee'

evidence.network: JWT payload: {grantId, ownerId, allowedMetrics, dataStart, dataEnd, iat, exp, jti} — all 8 required claims present

frictions.description: Rate limiting on /api/viewer/validate (10 requests per window) triggered during testing after several setup API calls. Required a 65-second wait before the validate endpoint could be called.
frictions.resolution: Waited for rate limit window to reset (65 seconds) before retrying validation call

frictions.description: GET /api/viewer/data requires 'metrics' and 'start' query parameters — not immediately obvious from the assertion description which says 'with valid viewer session'
frictions.resolution: Added required query params (metrics, start, end) to the viewer data request

summary: Tested 10 assertions: all 10 passed. Viewer validate correctly returns 200 with grant details and sets httpOnly totus_viewer JWT cookie (VAL-API-019, VAL-AUTH-006). Invalid tokens return 404 SHARE_NOT_FOUND (VAL-API-020). Viewer data returns only granted metrics within scope (VAL-API-021), narrows out-of-scope metric requests (VAL-API-022), and returns 403 for empty intersection (VAL-API-040). Expired tokens (VAL-AUTH-007) and revoked grants (VAL-AUTH-008) correctly return errors. JWT TTL follows min(grant_expires, now+4h) (VAL-AUTH-017) and contains all 8 required claims (VAL-AUTH-018).
